item.title: I used to wake up, grab my phone, scroll for an hour, drink coffee, and wonder why I felt foggy and anxious by 10am every single day I was rotting my brain before I even got out of bed The wild part is none of the things that actually fix this cost anythi
item.description: By @hakyourhealth: I used to wake up, grab my phone, scroll for an hour, drink coffee, and wonder why I felt foggy and anxious by 10am every single day I was rotting my brain before I even got out of bed The wild part is none of the things that actually fix this cost anythi
